data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of calculating the discount percentage, but the evidence does not explicitly confirm that the system can perform this calculation. While the linked use case describes a scenario involving discounts, it does not provide concrete evidence of the calculation process itself. The prior steps indicate successful bookings and offers, but they do not demonstrate the actual calculation of the discount percentage, leading to a gap in fulfilling the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the system calculating the discount percentage.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
